channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ 6 Maps ] Dead City 2
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 7
Kill plenty of zombies starting in RiverSide (city) Battle through the Back Alleys, over a Draw Bridge, at a Military Outpost Find yourself at a Water Plant and escape at the Subway Station
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 7
Kill plenty of zombies starting in RiverSide (city) Battle through the Back Alleys, over a Draw Bridge, at a Military Outpost Find yourself at a Water Plant and escape at the Subway Station

item.title: [ File ] Counterside Engage & Assemble OST TANK
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
Since i haven't seen any Tank Music from Counterside, I might as well make one instead NOTICE The Assemble in this mods do not have a loop and its not good as its own, so i mixed with Engage ost to make it work and it came out nicely. If only i can produce music instead of editing Anyway making it loop is kinda hard but it came out well than i though it should To listen to the whole music, must extract the files and into the games Tank folder. once you do that then use the command prompt in the games tool and write snd_rebuildaudiocache
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
Since i haven't seen any Tank Music from Counterside, I might as well make one instead NOTICE The Assemble in this mods do not have a loop and its not good as its own, so i mixed with Engage ost to make it work and it came out nicely. If only i can produce music instead of editing Anyway making it loop is kinda hard but it came out well than i though it should To listen to the whole music, must extract the files and into the games Tank folder. once you do that then use the command prompt in the games tool and write snd_rebuildaudiocache

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Dark Carnival: Remix
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Dark Carnival: Remix is a redesign of Dark Carnival that remakes the layout and adds new areas and events in Whispering Oaks to explore. Beta content has also been brought to life and restored. See the Tunnel of Love with flowing water, the towering Ferris Wheel spinning around, and the explosive Concert finale as it was originally intended. Players in Versus Mode will also have access to new mechanics to create more competitively viable experience. Finally , there's a secret ending cutscene that bridges the gap between Dark Carnival and Swamp Fever if you can find all five secret coins (one on each map)! Version 2.0 is now out! Containing a brand new redesign of Map 1 (The Motel), revamps and new areas added to other maps, balance changes for Versus and Coop, and a huge amount of new polish. Please see the changelog for the full list of changes! IMPORTANT: Please disable Cuba's Addendum Mod for Dark Carnival Remix. It currently breaks the map in the new update! Credits: Level Design: Valve, NF Models: Roku, SpeedBoost Textures: NF, Henrietta, Eranthis, Gyroic Scripts: NF, Daroot Leafstorm, Cuba Testers: Olde, Jacob, Sir, Roku, Epilimic, MrFunreal
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Dark Carnival: Remix is a redesign of Dark Carnival that remakes the layout and adds new areas and events in Whispering Oaks to explore. Beta content has also been brought to life and restored. See the Tunnel of Love with flowing water, the towering Ferris Wheel spinning around, and the explosive Concert finale as it was originally intended. Players in Versus Mode will also have access to new mechanics to create more competitively viable experience. Finally , there's a secret ending cutscene that bridges the gap between Dark Carnival and Swamp Fever if you can find all five secret coins (one on each map)! Version 2.0 is now out! Containing a brand new redesign of Map 1 (The Motel), revamps and new areas added to other maps, balance changes for Versus and Coop, and a huge amount of new polish. Please see the changelog for the full list of changes! IMPORTANT: Please disable Cuba's Addendum Mod for Dark Carnival Remix. It currently breaks the map in the new update! Credits: Level Design: Valve, NF Models: Roku, SpeedBoost Textures: NF, Henrietta, Eranthis, Gyroic Scripts: NF, Daroot Leafstorm, Cuba Testers: Olde, Jacob, Sir, Roku, Epilimic, MrFunreal

item.title: [ Mod ] Bucket Toilet [ Gnome Chompski ]
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
Replace Gnome Chompski with a Bucket Toilet, comes with a custom texture for peanut gallery gnome sign in Dark Carnival: Fairgrounds. Includes 2 version: default skin / golden skin [Update] Golden ver has been released on 7/6/2026, download again if you are interested. file list: bucket toilet[gnome]1.02.vpk bucket toilet (golden) [gnome]1.00.vpk To install, place the vpk into your game directory, inside the addons folder. (path of your steam folder)\Steam\steamapps\common\left 4 dead 2\left4dead2\addons\ credits: bucket model and texture : Valve edited by doe5493 /yt@catwithouthumanears known issue: - cl_viewmodelfovsurvivor should be below 71 or first-person view may looks weird. - shiny effect for the golden ver. requires shader detail set to be high. - do not active both version at the same time. - warning: toilet papers are not included always make sure to check for virus whatever you trying to download
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
Replace Gnome Chompski with a Bucket Toilet, comes with a custom texture for peanut gallery gnome sign in Dark Carnival: Fairgrounds. Includes 2 version: default skin / golden skin [Update] Golden ver has been released on 7/6/2026, download again if you are interested. file list: bucket toilet[gnome]1.02.vpk bucket toilet (golden) [gnome]1.00.vpk To install, place the vpk into your game directory, inside the addons folder. (path of your steam folder)\Steam\steamapps\common\left 4 dead 2\left4dead2\addons\ credits: bucket model and texture : Valve edited by doe5493 /yt@catwithouthumanears known issue: - cl_viewmodelfovsurvivor should be below 71 or first-person view may looks weird. - shiny effect for the golden ver. requires shader detail set to be high. - do not active both version at the same time. - warning: toilet papers are not included always make sure to check for virus whatever you trying to download

item.title: [ Mod ] Only LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 (request)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 (request) VOCALOID3 LuoTianYi (Canary Dress Ver) Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Zoey voice support works Credits: skin - Peakness Yang [LuoTianYi(Canary Dress Ver) For louis in L4D1 v10] skin,sound edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 bill.vpk (bill skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 francis.vpk (francis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 louis.vpk (Louis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 zoey.vpk (zoey skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 coach.vpk (coach skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 elliss.vpk (ellis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 nick.vpk (nick skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 (request) VOCALOID3 LuoTianYi (Canary Dress Ver) Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Zoey voice support works Credits: skin - Peakness Yang [LuoTianYi(Canary Dress Ver) For louis in L4D1 v10] skin,sound edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 bill.vpk (bill skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 francis.vpk (francis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 louis.vpk (Louis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 zoey.vpk (zoey skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 coach.vpk (coach skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 elliss.vpk (ellis skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 nick.vpk (nick skin) LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10 rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only LuoTianYi Canary Dress Ver10.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.
